# CelesteOS
> Search-first engineering intelligence for superyachts (30-70m).

CelesteOS is a vessel knowledge management system that connects maintenance records, fault history, parts, certificates, and compliance into a single searchable interface.

## Core Capabilities
- NLP search across all vessel knowledge — manuals, faults, work orders, parts, history, handovers
- Auto-generated engineering handover documents pulling from every operational domain
- Signed immutable audit trail — every action recorded, attributable, append-only
- Cross-domain actions — fault to work order to parts to purchase order, all connected
- Email integration — Microsoft Exchange correspondence searchable alongside vessel records

## Who Uses It
- Chief Engineers — primary user
- ETOs (Electronics/Technical Officers)
- Captains
- Fleet Technical Managers (shore-based)

## Target Vessels
Private and charter superyachts, 30-70m.
